title: Epic skate competition hosted at Diaz Beach
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - On Sunday 21 September, Bitcoin Ekasi and the Surfer Kids hosted an epic skating competition at the Diaz Beach Skate Bowl.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - On Sunday 21 September, Bitcoin Ekasi and the Surfer Kids hosted an epic skating competition at the Diaz Beach Skate Bowl."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Held on a beautiful day filled with good vibes and solid skating, the event attracted a great crowd cheering each participant on."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Some of the winners included Alfonzo Serfontein in the open division category and the seven-year-old Amawethu Madiyavula in the U12 division. They rolled away with Bitcoin satoshis (the smallest denomination of Bitcoin) as prizes.","html":"Some of the winners included Alfonzo Serfontein in the open division category and the seven-year-old Amawethu Madiyavula in the U12 division. They rolled away with Bitcoin satoshis (the smallest denomination of Bitcoin) as prizes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Surfer Kids is an afterschool non-profit surfing programme aimed at empower youth from previously disadvantaged communities by teaching long-term commitment through surfing.","html":"The Surfer Kids is an afterschool non-profit surfing programme aimed at empower youth from previously disadvantaged communities by teaching long-term commitment through surfing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Epic skate competition hosted at Diaz Beach
